caption: A government committee meeting takes place in a room with white walls and wooden paneling. Several people are seated around a conference table, including a man in a dark suit and tie who is speaking and gesturing with his hands, a man in a grey sweater and white shirt, and a woman in a black dress and a woman in a red jacket. Water bottles and papers are spread across the table. In the foreground, a man in a dark suit is seen from the side. A green banner at the bottom of the screen contains the text "ORCA House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs" and "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage," with the date "April 12, 2019" appearing above it. As the sequence progresses, the man in the suit continues to speak, moving his hands in a conversational manner, while the other attendees listen.
